salla_review.notes: Salla's final review is manual. This waiver allows local delivery packaging after all local factory gates pass for the exact fingerprint.

evidence.notes: Local factory certification passed for the current fingerprint.
Visual checklist was updated after fixing local preview and product flip-card styling.

waiver.reason: Salla review is a manual post-delivery process: the theme folder is handed to Salla and they review it using their own workflow. Local factory certification, visual checklist, browser smoke, Twilight smoke, RTL, page contracts, links, and coverage all passed for this fingerprint.
